data.name: migration_description
data.value: This could take a few minutes depending on the speed of your disk(s).

data.name: prohibited_interact_during_migration
data.value: Please avoid interacting with the game!

data.name: target_directory_already_installed_osu
data.value: The target directory already seems to have an osu! install. Use that data instead?

data.name: restart_and_re_open_required_for_completion
data.value: To complete this operation, osu! will close. Please open it again to use the new data location.

data.name: delete_all_external_beatmaps
data.value: Delete ALL external beatmaps (remove references only)

data.name: delete_all_external_beatmaps_with_count
data.value: Delete ALL external beatmaps (remove references only) [{0}]

data.name: restore_all_recently_deleted_mod_presets
data.value: Restore all recently deleted mod presets

data.name: no_mod_presets_found_to_delete
data.value: No mod presets found to delete!

data.name: no_mod_presets_found_to_restore
data.value: No mod presets found to restore!

data.name: stable_directory_select_header
data.value: Please select your osu!stable install location
